title: Roasted Turkish Black Beans Borek
description: A Mediterranean dish featuring roasted black beans in a crispy borek pastry, perfect for a date night dinner. It is a reduced and aerated version of the traditional Turkish borek.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the borek pastry and cut it into triangles.
In a bowl, mix together the roasted black beans, chopped onion, minced garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Place a tablespoon of the black bean mixture onto the center of each pastry triangle.
Top the black bean mixture with a sprinkle of crumbled feta cheese.
Fold the pastry triangles into triangles and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the borek with olive oil and bake for 25 minutes.
Serve the borek hot and enjoy.
Let the borek cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with fresh parsley or dill if desired.
